markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard William by setting up tools and reviewing company processes.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Tool Setup:** Completed setup for Gmail, Slack, 1Password, Notion, and Linear, resolving initial access issues.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [**Reporting Structure:** George (Chief of Staff) is William's temporary manager and onboarding buddy; the permanent structure will be defined by Andy post-onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [**Onboarding Plan:** The plan is tracked in Linear (`Onboarding William account`), with tasks tagged by timeline (Day 1, Week 1).](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2290.0)
  - [**Key Processes:** Daily standups via Geekbot are mandatory. PTO is unlimited (approx. 4 weeks/yr) and requires no approval, only advance calendar booking.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)

## Topics

### Tool Setup & Access

  - [**Problem:** William could not access tools, having missed the welcome email with setup instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**Solution:** Completed setup live on the call.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [**Okta:** Activated account to enable single sign-on.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [**Gmail:** Logged into `william@growthx.ai` using Okta FastPass.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [**Slack:** Joined the GrowthX workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
      - [**1Password:** Activated account; Alice granted access to shared vaults.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
      - [**Notion:** Logged in.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
      - [**Linear:** Joined relevant workspaces (Delivery, Ops, EPD).](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
      - [**Shared Account (`team@growthxlabs.com`):** Added to Gmail.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
          - [**Purpose:** For shared tool access and receiving client platform invites.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
          - [**Access:** Login requires a One-Time Password (OTP) from 1Password.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2857.0)

### Onboarding Plan & Resources

  - [**Location:** Notion → `Handbook` → `Onboarding Resources` → `Company-wide onboarding`.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
  - [**Structure:** Tasks are organized by timeline (Day 1, Week 1) and duplicated in Linear for tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2290.0)
  - [**Linear Project:** `Onboarding William account`](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2290.0)
      - [**Task Management:** Mark individual tasks as `Done` using the dotted circle.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2387.0)
      - [**Project Status:** Update the overall project status (e.g., `In Progress`, `Completed`) in the right-hand properties panel.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2437.0)

### Company Processes & Expectations

  - [**Communication (Slack):**](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
      - [Primary channel for all internal and client communication.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
      - [**Channel Naming:**](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
          - [`D-X-ClientName`: External (client-facing).](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
          - [`D-INT-ClientName`: Internal (GrowthX team only).](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [**Daily Standups (Geekbot):**](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
      - [Mandatory daily prompt in Slack for updates (work, blockers, help needed).](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
      - [Responses are posted to the relevant team channel (e.g., `PodJacoob`) for team visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [**Time Off Policy (PTO):**](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2565.0)
      - [Unlimited PTO (approx. 4 weeks/year is standard).](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2583.0)
      - [**Process:** No approval needed; just book time on the calendar in advance.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2583.0)
  - [**Employee Referral Program:**](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2628.0)
      - [**Bonus:** $10k USD for engineering roles, $5k USD for non-engineering roles.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2628.0)
      - [**Condition:** Referred hire must stay for 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2628.0)
  - [**IT Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2677.0)
      - **Channel:** `#it-and-tools` in Slack.
      - [**Contacts:** Alice Ochieng (tools access), Yusuf (Head of IT, San Francisco-based).](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2677.0)

### Reporting Structure & Team

  - [**Temporary Manager:** George (Chief of Staff).](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
      - [**Role:** Onboarding buddy and primary resource for questions.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=1999.0)
  - [**Permanent Structure:** To be defined by Andy post-onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2946.0)
      - [**Context:** A recent re-org changed the reporting structure from what was discussed during interviews.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
  - [**Team Assignment:** William's "pod" will be assigned after onboarding is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2946.0)

      - [Prepare for the biweekly all-hands introduction next Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2769.0)
  - [**Alice:**](https://fathom.video/share/f1M4NNNyJvhg6PBtkuerFxo3xSnfXvpR?tab=summary&timestamp=2202.0)
